reasoning: Reviewed full order details and Comments History. Internal staff notes clearly state this is an INTERNATIONAL ORDER with the package stuck in customs (Brazil) for 45 days. Tracking shows Shipped → In Transit → Customs Hold. Policy explicitly notes international customs delays are not covered and refund is not automatically warranted. Prior staff recommendation is to ESCALATE to the international team for potential goodwill resolution (partial refund or reshipment). Due to customs involvement and policy exception handling, this request should be escalated rather than approved or denied outright.
